rules.pickupBusinessTime: all computed pickup dates are normalized into Australia business time: weekdays only, 10:00-16:00; missing/00:00 times become 10:00, after-hours move to the next business slot
rules.expectedPickupTime: if actual_arrived_port_time is missing use plan_arrived_port_time + 7 days; if arrived use actual_arrived_port_time + 7 days; whenever either computed pickup time is already in the past while the order is still undelivered, move it to now + 1 day; every resulting pickup time is then normalized into Australia business time on a weekday between 10:00 and 16:00; clean rows are shown as confirmed pickup time in green
rules.clearanceStatus: import_clearance_status now comes from live FBADIDI crowdfund/tad rows when available: 2/clean -> clean, 1/held -> held, empty -> pending
rules.eligibility: pull live crowdfund rows whose actual_arrived_port_time is on or after Australia today minus 16 days, or whose actual_arrived_port_time is missing but plan_arrived_port_time has reached Australia today minus 3 days and is still within the last 30 days; then extract all putCodes under those crowdfunds; skip TLA rows only when a courier binding/refId already exists, and also skip any providers listed in excludedProviders
rules.invoiceData: dropoff address, weight, cbm, provider, refId, and chargeCode are fetched from the external putCode order API first, then the authenticated FBADIDI invoice detail APIs, with the legacy invoice script used only as final fallback
rules.priceFormula: calculate both TLA and Zongheng workbook prices when available, then use the lower one; TLA uses its city zone workbook, Zongheng uses postcode zones plus any interstate truck surcharge based on unload city from destination_port (fallback: crowdfund/warehouse hints); uncovered orders keep max(minimumPriceAud, distanceKm * pallets * audPerKmPerPallet)
rules.assignmentMergeRule: when a batch-assigned group from the same assignmentSource is already locked to the same driver and shares the same pickup address, dropoff address, and expected pickup time, merge those rows into one delivery order and keep the child putCodes in mergedOrderCodes
